title: Skill
description: An installed skill, recorded in track.yaml.

createdAt.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp stamped by sauron when the document was created; never hand-edited.

lastUpdatedAt.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp stamped by sauron on the document's most recent write; never hand-edited.

version.description: Identity read from the source — the artifact directory's git tree hash, or the http object version — compared by sync and upgrade to detect change.

path.description: Exact installed location relative to the provider root: `<kind>/sauron-<name>` (e.g. `skills/sauron-<name>`).
